description_long: This is a pair of round sunglasses with large, perfectly circular lenses set in a thin, metallic full-rim frame. The lenses are opaque and dark, providing a bold contrast to the slender, minimalist frame. The temples are straight and thin, with a slight curve at the ends for a secure fit behind the ears, and feature dark-colored tips for added comfort. The bridge is a simple, straight bar connecting the two lenses, with no visible nose pads or embellishments. The overall design is sleek and modern, reminiscent of classic John Lennon-style eyewear. No visible branding or decorative elements are present, emphasizing a clean and understated aesthetic.
description: A pair of round, dark-lensed sunglasses with a thin metallic frame and minimalist design. The temples are straight with dark tips, and the bridge is a simple bar.
description_view_0: Front view showing the perfectly round, dark lenses and the thin, metallic full-rim frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the frame and the straight, slender temples with curved tips.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inside of the frame and the dark temple tips extending outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the thin frame and temple structure seen in view 1.
attribute_frame_design: The frame features a full-rim, perfectly round geometry with a thin, minimalist profile. The temples are straight and slender, curving slightly at the ends, and the overall style is classic and understated with no decorative embellishments.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are fully opaque and black, with no visible gradient, transparency, or special effects.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a simple, straight bar connecting the two lenses, with no visible nose pads or additional structural features.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are thin and straight with a gentle curve at the tips, which are capped with dark-colored ends for comfort. No patterns, engravings, or decorative elements are visible.
